Moonshot AI 的官方账号 @Kimi_Moonshot 发推祝贺 Cursor 发布 Composer 2，表示"很自豪看到 Kimi K2.5 提供了基础"，并确认 Cursor 是通过 Fireworks 的托管推理和强化学习平台获得授权的商业合作伙伴。措辞从 Yulun Du 几小时前的公开质问，180 度转向了官方背书。
https://t.co/OfMs0lm7ZI

@Kimi_Moonshot 紧接着，Cursor 联合创始人 Aman Sanger 也发了一条详细回应。他解释了技术路径：团队评估了大量基座模型，Kimi K2.5 在困惑度指标上表现最强，之后 Cursor 在此基础上做了持续预训练和 4 倍算力规模的强化学习。https://t.co/1QNzHGGRsb

他承认在发布博客中没有提到 Kimi

BREAKING: The first legal precedent for AI agent access rights is being written right now.

A federal judge ruled that user consent doesn’t equal platform authorization. The 9th Circuit stayed the injunction days later. The legal framework is still forming in real time.

What’s

Palantir CTO Shyam Sankar on how the future of AI will actually be decided:

"These technology revolutions are usually, by the vast majority, are tool revolutions, not concept revolutions."

"It was not Galileo who invented the telescope. He used it to discover planetary motion." https://t.co/dN1isdz9BE
